/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o bin/libEngine.dylib -install_name @rpath/libEngine.dylib CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/BerryFlux/src/BerryFlux/Application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/BerryFlux/src/BerryFlux/Log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/BerryFlux/src/Platform/GLFWWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/BerryFlux/src/BerryFlux/Layer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Engine.dir/BerryFlux/src/BerryFlux/LayerStack.cpp.o  BerryFlux/vendor/GLFW/src/libglfw3.a -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
